name: Sweet Dreams
recipeInstructions: Cream the butter, add brown sugar and egg and beat well. Mix together the flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and ginger and blend well. Combine with butter mixture. Fold in the walnuts, chocolate chips, and vanilla. Chill for several hours. Form the dough into 1 inch balls and roll them in the powdered sugar. Place on a lightly greased cookie sheet and bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes. Makes 6 dozen
